name_cn:
Kelly Elan 27cm 89 Black Silver Hardware
The first true Kelly in the family, with no flaws in capacity, thickness, or shoulder strap length. A bag with a very high daily usage rate~
A graceful slender silhouette, paired with lambskin and black-silver for a full vintage vibe, with perfect storage. The shoulder strap length is very nice for the underarm carry!
